zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier於1236年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，他的父親Philippe DE CREQUY41歲，母親Alix DE PICQUIGNY36歲。他於1254年6月14日與Aélis de Heilly在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier于1236年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛时，他的父亲Philippe DE CREQUY41岁，母亲Alix DE PICQUIGNY36岁。他于1254年6月14日与Aélis de Heilly在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: Preux"

variants.name: Preuss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Eckhard, Erwin, Gerda, Horst, Gunter, Ilse, Klaus, Lothar, Monika, Rainer.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Prussia (German Preussen), a former state of northern Germany, so called from the ethnic name of a Baltic people (see Prus ) displaced by the Germans during the 13th century, or an ethnic name for a member of this people.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier was born in 1236, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Philippe DE CREQUY, was 41 and his mother, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, was 36. He married Aélis de Heilly on 14 June 1254, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1282, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier est né en 1236, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Philippe DE CREQUY, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Aélis de Heilly le 14 juin 1254, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1282, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier 1236 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe DE CREQUY 41 und seine Mutter Alix DE PICQUIGNY 36. Er hat am 14. Juni 1254 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Aélis de Heilly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier è nato il nel 1236 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Philippe DE CREQUY, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Aélis de Heilly il 14 giugno 1254, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1282, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalierが1236年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Philippe DE CREQUYは41歳，母Alix DE PICQUIGNYは36歳であった。1254年6月14日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでAélis de Heillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier(이)가 1236년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe DE CREQUY(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix DE PICQUIGNY(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1254년 6월 14일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Aélis de Heilly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier nasceu em 1236, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Philippe DE CREQUY, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Aélis de Heilly em 14 de junho de 1254, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1282, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier родился в 1236 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe DE CREQUY было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alix DE PICQUIGNY, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Aélis de Heilly 14 июня 1254 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1282 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier nació en 1236, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Philippe DE CREQUY, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Aélis de Heilly el 14 de junio de 1254, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1282, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
